data.description:
## Why
Code review (M2) found contract input-schema resolution duplicated across modules,
risking edit-time vs runtime divergence.

## What / Scope
Consolidate the "resolve a step/prompt's INPUT schema name" logic currently repeated in
`interpreter._consumer_input_schema`, `editor._config_input_schema`, and the field
extraction in `editor._schema_fields` into ONE shared helper, used by both the runtime
validator (interpreter) and the edit-time validator (editor).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A single shared helper resolves a step/prompt input schema name (scripted via contract_for, agent via get_prompt.inputs).
- [ ] `interpreter.validate_consumer_input` and `editor.validate_node_config` both use it (no parallel reimplementations).
- [ ] Existing validation tests stay green; behavior unchanged.
data.title: Consolidate duplicated contract input-schema resolution (editor + interpreter)
